ucs.title: [LLM] TeamTNT cloud-credential harvest from compromised Linux/container hosts (IMDS + ~/.aws + kubelet creds)
ucs.description: Hunts TeamTNT's signature post-compromise behavior: a process running inside a container or on a Linux host enumerating AWS Instance Metadata Service (169.254.169.254), reading ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.docker/config.json, or /var/lib/kubelet tokens. TeamTNT (a.k.a. the same cluster Cado tracks as the 'Chimaera' / 'Black-T' / 'Hildegard' campaigns) uniquely chains cloud cred theft with XMRig rather than data theft, which separates it from generic IMDS abuse by red teams.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os=Linux AND (Processes.process="*169.254.169.254*" OR Processes.process="*/.aws/credentials*" OR Processes.process="*/.aws/config*" OR Processes.process="*/var/lib/kubelet*" OR Processes.process="*/.docker/config.json*" OR Processes.process="*AWS_ACCESS_KEY*" OR Processes.process="*latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials*" OR Processes.process="*GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where parent_process_name IN ("sh","bash","dash","zsh","ash","docker","dockerd","containerd-shim","containerd-shim-runc-v2","runc","containerd","kubelet","crio","python","python3","perl") | join type=outer host [| tstats summariesonly=true values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dest_ips count as net_count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_ip="169.254.169.254" by All_Traffic.src as host] | eval risk=case(net_count>0 AND match(cmdline,"\.aws/credentials"),"high", net_count>0,"medium", 1=1,"low") | table firstTime lastTime host user parent process_name cmdline dest_ips risk
ucs.kql:
let credPaths = dynamic(["/.aws/credentials","/.aws/config","/.docker/config.json","/var/lib/kubelet","/root/.kube/config","/.gcloud/credentials","/.azure/accessTokens.json","id_rsa","id_ecdsa"]);
let credHunters = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where DeviceInfo_OS == "Linux" or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("docker","dockerd","containerd-shim","runc","kubelet","crio","bash","sh","dash","zsh")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (credPaths)
     or ProcessCommandLine has "169.254.169.254"
     or ProcessCommandLine has "latest/meta-data/iam/security-credentials"
     or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"AWS_(ACCESS_KEY|SECRET_ACCESS_KEY|SESSION_TOKEN)"
| extend imds = ProcessCommandLine has "169.254.169.254", credFile = ProcessCommandLine has_any (credPaths)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, imds, credFile, ReportId;
let imdsNet = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemoteIP == "169.254.169.254"
| project NetTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, NetInitiatingProcess=InitiatingProcessFileName, NetCmd=InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
credHunters
| join kind=leftouter (imdsNet) on DeviceName
| where credFile or imds or isnotempty(NetTime)
| extend Severity = case(credFile and (imds or isnotempty(NetTime)), "High", credFile or isnotempty(NetTime), "Medium", "Low")
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: TeamTNT is the only major actor whose entire economic model is built on harvesting cloud creds from container hosts to spread XMRig — Palo Alto Unit 42 (Black-T, Hildegard), Cado, Lacework, and Trend Micro reports all document the exact tool family (TNTbotinger, ezuri-packed shell scripts, Chimaera worm) calling IMDS and grepping ~/.aws/credentials. Joining IMDS network hits against credential-fil

ucs.title: [LLM] TeamTNT container escape → XMRig / Tsunami deployment chain (Docker/K8s API abuse + miner)
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical TeamTNT kill chain: an exposed Docker daemon or kubelet API spawns a privileged/host-mounted container, which curls a stage-2 shell script (often Ezuri-packed), disables defenses, and drops XMRig (or kdevtmpfsi/kinsing collisions, Tsunami IRC bot, Diamorphine rootkit) with persistence via systemd. This combination — container-runtime parent + miner binary + chattr/history-wipe + mining-pool egress — is a TeamTNT fingerprint.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_name) as proc values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os=Linux AND Processes.parent_process_name IN ("dockerd","docker","containerd","containerd-shim","containerd-shim-runc-v2","runc","crio","kubelet") AND (Processes.process_name IN ("xmrig","kdevtmpfsi","kinsing","tsh","masscan","pnscan","zgrab","tmate","weave") OR Processes.process="*--donate-level*" OR Processes.process="*stratum+tcp*" OR Processes.process="*moneroocean*" OR Processes.process="*supportxmr*" OR Processes.process="*c3pool*" OR Processes.process="*nanopool*" OR Processes.process="*chattr -i*" OR Processes.process="*history -c*" OR Processes.process="*/dev/null 2>&1*xmr*" OR Processes.process="*ezuri*" OR Processes.process="*Diamorphine*" OR Processes.process="*tnt*.sh*" OR Processes.process="*kube.lateral.sh*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port IN (3333,4444,5555,7777,8888,9999,14444,14433,45700) by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | rename src as host] | stats values(*) as * count by host | where count>=2
ucs.kql:
let runtimeParents = dynamic(["dockerd","docker","containerd","containerd-shim","containerd-shim-runc-v2","runc","crio","kubelet"]);
let minerNames = dynamic(["xmrig","kdevtmpfsi","kinsing","tsh","masscan","pnscan","zgrab","tmate"]);
let poolStrings = dynamic(["stratum+tcp","--donate-level","supportxmr","moneroocean","c3pool","nanopool","minexmr","xmrpool"]);
let defenseEvasion = dynamic(["chattr -i","chattr +i","history -c","unset HISTFILE","ld.so.preload","Diamorphine","ezuri"]);
let stageOne = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (runtimeParents) or InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ (runtimeParents)
| where FileName in~ (minerNames)
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any (poolStrings)
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any (defenseEvasion)
   or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(curl|wget)\s+[^|]*\|\s*(sh|bash)"
| extend signal = case(
    FileName in~ (minerNames), "miner_binary",
    ProcessCommandLine has_any (poolStrings), "mining_pool_arg",
    ProcessCommandLine has_any (defenseEvasion), "defense_evasion",
    "curl_pipe_sh")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessParentFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, signal, ReportId;
let poolEgress = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemotePort in (3333,4444,5555,7777,8888,9999,14444,14433,45700)
   or RemoteUrl has_any ("supportxmr","moneroocean","minexmr","c3pool","nanopool","xmrpool")
| project NetTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName;
stageOne
| join kind=leftouter (poolEgress) on DeviceName
| summarize signals=make_set(signal), pools=make_set(RemotePort), urls=make_set(RemoteUrl), cmds=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 5), firstSeen=min(Timestamp), lastSeen=max(Timestamp) by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where array_length(signals) >= 2 or array_length(pools) > 0
| extend Severity = iff(array_length(pools)>0 and array_length(signals)>=2, "Critical", "High")
ucs.rationale: TeamTNT campaigns documented by Trend Micro (Chimaera), Lacework (TNTbotinger), AT&T Alien Labs (Chimaera), and Cado (the original 2020 worm) all share the same fingerprint: a process whose parent is a container runtime (not init/systemd) launching XMRig/Tsunami plus chattr/history wipes plus stratum egress. Requiring two of {miner binary, pool string, defense-evasion command, curl|sh} from a cont
